action: Use Level 1 support, record evidence, apply scaffolds, review in 1-2 weeks.

trigger: Three repeated red/yellow IVF markers in one week
action: Open Tier 2 case, schedule targeted support, log intervention plan.

trigger: No benchmark improvement after 14-day Tier 2 cycle
action: Create Individualized Educational Strategy, contact parents, schedule review.

trigger: Persistent serious concern or safeguarding issue
action: Follow local policy, refer to specialist, document decisions.

trigger: Systemic refusal to provide support systems
action: Submit evidence-based proposal to leadership first; if lawful and necessary, escalate through official ministry channels.
